description: Adds the recommended DMARC TXT record for an email sending domain or subdomain.
variableDescription: %dmarcReportMailbox%: mailbox that should receive DMARC aggregate and forensic reports.

records.data: v=DMARC1; p=none; sp=none; adkim=r; aspf=r; pct=100; fo=1; rua=mailto:%dmarcReportMailbox%; ruf=mailto:%dmarcReportMailbox%
